mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{status}, #{receiveTime}, #{useTime}, #{expireTime}, #{orderId}, #{couponName}, #{discountAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount FROM user_coupon WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY receive_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY receive_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}

SELECT id, user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time, use_time, expire_time, order_id, coupon_name, discount_amount FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW()) ORDER BY receive_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupon SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_coupon SET status = 1, use_time = NOW(), order_id = #{orderId}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount} WHERE id = #{id}
